출애굽기 40:2.content: “On the first day of the first month you shall raise up the tabernacle of the Tent of Meeting.

출애굽기 40:3.content: You shall put the ark of the covenant in it, and you shall screen the ark with the veil.

출애굽기 40:4.content: You shall bring in the table, and set in order the things that are on it. You shall bring in the lamp stand, and light its lamps.

출애굽기 40:5.content: You shall set the golden altar for incense before the ark of the covenant, and put the screen of the door to the tabernacle.

출애굽기 40:6.content: “You shall set the altar of burnt offering before the door of the tabernacle of the Tent of Meeting.

출애굽기 40:7.content: You shall set the basin between the Tent of Meeting and the altar, and shall put water therein.

출애굽기 40:8.content: You shall set up the court around it, and hang up the screen of the gate of the court.

출애굽기 40:9.content: “You shall take the anointing oil, and anoint the tabernacle and all that is in it, and shall make it holy, and all its furniture, and it will be holy.

출애굽기 40:10.content: You shall anoint the altar of burnt offering, with all its vessels, and sanctify the altar, and the altar will be most holy.

출애굽기 40:11.content: You shall anoint the basin and its base, and sanctify it.

출애굽기 40:12.content: “You shall bring Aaron and his sons to the door of the Tent of Meeting, and shall wash them with water.

출애굽기 40:13.content: You shall put on Aaron the holy garments; and you shall anoint him, and sanctify him, that he may minister to me in the priest’s office.

출애굽기 40:14.content: You shall bring his sons, and put tunics on them.

출애굽기 40:15.content: You shall anoint them, as you anointed their father, that they may minister to me in the priest’s office. Their anointing shall be to them for an everlasting priesthood throughout their generations.”

출애굽기 40:16.content: Moses did so. According to all that Yahweh commanded him, so he did.

출애굽기 40:17.content: In the first month in the second year, on the first day of the month, the tabernacle was raised up.

출애굽기 40:18.content: Moses raised up the tabernacle, and laid its sockets, and set up its boards, and put in its bars, and raised up its pillars.

출애굽기 40:19.content: He spread the covering over the tent, and put the roof of the tabernacle above on it, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

출애굽기 40:20.content: He took and put the covenant into the ark, and set the poles on the ark, and put the mercy seat above on the ark.

출애굽기 40:21.content: He brought the ark into the tabernacle, and set up the veil of the screen, and screened the ark of the covenant, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

출애굽기 40:22.content: He put the table in the Tent of Meeting, on the north side of the tabernacle, outside of the veil.

출애굽기 40:23.content: He set the bread in order on it before Yahweh, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

출애굽기 40:24.content: He put the lamp stand in the Tent of Meeting, opposite the table, on the south side of the tabernacle.

출애굽기 40:25.content: He lit the lamps before Yahweh, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

출애굽기 40:26.content: He put the golden altar in the Tent of Meeting before the veil;

출애굽기 40:27.content: and he burned incense of sweet spices on it, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

출애굽기 40:28.content: He put up the screen of the door to the tabernacle.

출애굽기 40:29.content: He set the altar of burnt offering at the door of the tabernacle of the Tent of Meeting, and offered on it the burnt offering and the meal offering, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

출애굽기 40:30.content: He set the basin between the Tent of Meeting and the altar, and put water therein, with which to wash.

출애굽기 40:31.content: Moses, Aaron, and his sons washed their hands and their feet there.

출애굽기 40:32.content: When they went into the Tent of Meeting, and when they came near to the altar, they washed, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

출애굽기 40:33.content: He raised up the court around the tabernacle and the altar, and set up the screen of the gate of the court. So Moses finished the work.

출애굽기 40:34.content: Then the cloud covered the Tent of Meeting, and Yahweh’s glory filled the tabernacle.

출애굽기 40:35.content: Moses wasn’t able to enter into the Tent of Meeting, because the cloud stayed on it, and Yahweh’s glory filled the tabernacle.

출애굽기 40:36.content: When the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle, the children of Israel went onward, throughout all their journeys;

출애굽기 40:37.content: but if the cloud wasn’t taken up, then they didn’t travel until the day that it was taken up.

출애굽기 40:38.content: For the cloud of Yahweh was on the tabernacle by day, and there was fire in the cloud by night, in the sight of all the house of Israel, throughout all their journeys.
